name: widget-panel
title: Widget Panel
description: The titled container every dashboard panel sits in — header (icon, title, description, actions), a body that swaps between ready / loading / empty / error, and an optional footer.

props.name: icon
props.description: Leading header icon, rendered in a tone-tinted chip.

props.name: tone
props.description: Accent color for the icon chip and top rule.

props.name: accent
props.description: Draw a thin colored accent rule along the top edge.

props.name: info
props.description: Info affordance beside the title — an icon button with a Tooltip.

props.name: empty
props.description: Empty body; a string renders a default EmptyState.

props.name: error
props.description: Error body; a string renders a default alert.

props.name: flush
props.description: Remove content padding for edge-to-edge tables/lists.

clinicalNotes: Every clinical panel must be able to express loading, empty, and error distinctly — a blank card is dangerous ambiguity at the point of care (no data vs. failed fetch vs. still loading). `state="error"` renders with role="alert" and loading sets aria-busy so assistive tech announces the transition. Keep the header title stable while the body swaps so a clinician doesn't lose their place.
notes: Layer-M0 keystone. Every M2 panel composes this.
